title: Dark Creamy Portuguese Sweets Tart
description: A rich and creamy tart perfect for breakfast or dessert, featuring dark brown sugar and a hint of spice.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use a high-protein flour for a flaky crust

ingredients.name: granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: white sugar for contrast to dark brown sugar

ingredients.name: dark brown sugar
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality dark brown sugar for the best flavor

ingredients.name: large eggs
ingredients.notes: room temperature eggs for a smooth filling

ingredients.name: heavy cream
ingredients.notes: whole heavy cream for a rich and creamy filling

ingredients.name: vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: use high-quality vanilla extract for the best flavor

ingredients.name: ground cinnamon
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality ground cinnamon for the best flavor

instructions: Roll out the chilled dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Chill the dough in the freezer for 15 minutes to firm up.
